title: Upgrade Armor & Items +
description: Create and Upgrade Versions of armors and items, Enhancing Hardcore Mods experience, adding bosses and new enemies  using vanilla resources
body:
This is a simple mod, adds a Upgrade version of Armors and Items of the vanilla minecraft.

![long gold](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a59f143e10aad77c3688f653b2917b040a7f6d8.png)

### Check The Lates Version (V1.6.9-Gold Update) (29/4/2025)
- [**New**] "Finished Tier" Upgrade Gold
- [**New**] "Finished Tier" Max Upgrade Gold
- [**New**] "Tier" Upgrade Netherite
- [**New**]  Feature when you activate the armor ability it appear upgrade particles
- [**New**]  Netherite totem of undying
- [**New**]  Objects netherite Star Ingot and Netherite Upgrade Templatet 
- [**New**] Finished Feature for all Upgrade Tools called shockwave
- [**New**] 3 Enchantments Shockwave edge, Swift Flow, Equilibrium
- [**New**] Upgrade Smithing Table (compatible with JEI)
- [**New**] 9 Recipes for Upgrade Smithing Table
- [**New**] Upgrade Iron Golem
- [**New**] Max Upgrade Iron Golem
- [**New**] Max Reforced Iron Block
- [**New**] 3 Food tiers ( Copper food , Netherite food, Golden Food )
- [**New**] Craftable Resonance Core star and Amethyst Resonance
- [**Rework**] Minor Balance Changes
- [**FIXED**] Minor Bugs
- [**Note**] This is my Bigest Update i hope you enjoy this C:

![long gold](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a59f143e10aad77c3688f653b2917b040a7f6d8.png)

I Suggest using me mod with scaling Health For a Better Experience: [Scaling Health](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/scaling-health)

(since armors and overpower items doesn't have any usesage after netherite this mod is the best option for a better experience)
      
¿What is the idea of the mod?

Create and Upgrade Versions of armors, items, mobs and bosses for complicated dungeons and bosses, Enhancing Hardcore Mods experience without the necessity of making different types of armors, using ALL vanilla resources. THX For reading all me mod content, you are awesome.

what incluede the mod? (look at the spoilers for all the content)
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
(V1.0.1) (20/2/2024)

Release date of the mod
- Upgrade Iron Armor (Special effects)
- Upgrade Iron Sword
- Iron Carrots
- Iron Apple & Enchanted Iron Apple
- Imbued Bright Melon

(V1.1.2) 

- More Upgrade tools!
- Iron Upgrade Smithing template (you can upgrade armor)
- Reforced Iron & Reforced Iron Block

(V1.2.9)


- Now You can upgrade tools with the Iron Upgrade template
- 3 New Types of totem (Upgrade totem, Emerald and Nether Star)
- New Structure (Dungeon)
- Some Balance Changes

(V1.3.7)

A lot of new content !

- New Tier Of Armor And Items The Second Upgrade (Better than upgrade armor and items)
- 
- Second Upgrade set of Armor (Press V to activate special ability)
- Sword And Pickaxe (Press Right Click Holding the Item)
- Second Upgrade Totem
- New items
- New SHIELD the Iron Shield (for now uncraftable) (currently testing this item) 
- New Food Iron Beef and Bread
- A new Totem Second Upgrade Totem
- Second Upgrade Smithing Template (use this to upgrade Armor)
- New Tier of Food(Emerald)
- Emerald Apple and Enchanted Emerald Apple
- Emerald Carrot
- Emerald Beef
- Emerald Bread
- Some Balance Changes

(V1.4.9) (4/1/2025)

- [New Tier] Upgraded Diamond
- [New] Upgraded Diamond Armor And Tools
- Revamp of Upgrade Iron Armor
- Completed Tool set Full Upgrade iron tier (the Hoe Doesn't Exist)
- The shovel mines at 3x3 blocks
- [New] Full Upgraded Iron Shield
- Now the Upgrade Iron Armor have an ability
- Now the iron Shield is craftable
- minor balance changes to Upgrade Iron tier
- [FIXED] BUG WITH TOTEMS ANIMATIONS (lets gooooo)
- Complete Rework of Full Upgrade Iron Armor (i change the name)

(V1.5.0) (25/1/2025)
the main focus of the update is the improvement.

- [New] Diamond Food
- [New] Diamond Totem of Undying
- [New] Imbued Bright Melon Block
- [Rework] Change to my first dungeon to cube dungeon
- Change to old textures
- Now you can make normal iron tools with reinforced iron
- [Rework] to how tool ability works before you need to right click to activate the ability now you need to do shift + right click 
- lowering the requirements to craft the armors and tools (except diamond)
- [FIXED] when you die using the armors ability it stop working


</details> 

I also have a fancy curseforge page: [Upgrade Armor & Items +](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/upgrade-armors-items)

### feedback well be good received

Comment: This is my first mod ever and i am making this mod with MCcreator special thanks to the MCcreator work team :D

(I am learning java to do better quality updates for this Mod)

 

 ¡FUTURE UPDATES COMING SOON!
